name: ewpros-auditor-wizard
description: EWPros field auditor PWA with matching interior/exterior HVAC and lighting inventories, proposed-device line fields, editable PData admin workspace, Asana CSV appointments, utility-specific signed BGE/PEPCO PDFs, CSV/photo export, Supabase, and Netlify Functions

scripts.check: node --check app.js && node --check lighting-catalog.js && node --check p-data.js && node --check audit-export.js && node --check admin/admin.js && node --check netlify/functions/_admin-auth.js && node --check netlify/functions/_asana-csv.js && node --check netlify/functions/_supabase.js && node --check netlify/functions/admin-login.js && node --check netlify/functions/send-audit-email.js && node --check netlify/functions/get-appointments.js && node --check netlify/functions/admin-dashboard.js && node --check netlify/functions/import-appointments.js && node --test tests/*.test.js
